scope: LAION CLAP promoted-package identity, exact-fixture CUDA inference, repeat determinism, speech-event gate, and process-exit cleanup

rejected_gate.reason: The immutable mixed speech-plus-sustained-tone fixture did not rank the predeclared speech label first. The observed failure is retained without post-result label tuning.

authority_granted: exact current-pod CUDA load and inference for this package and fixture
finite 512-dimensional audio and text embeddings for this run
exact-fixture embedding repeat determinism for this run
process-exit GPU cleanup for this run
rerun_policy: Do not rerun this unchanged fixture and label gate. Any replacement speech-event calibration must be prospectively specified with clean speech, tone-only, silence, and mixed controls before execution.
next_action: Advance a deterministic forced-alignment and audio-event calibration package against prospectively declared clean and adversarial fixtures; retain Omni host-memory discrimination as a separate held lane.
